items.title: Wait, Brendan Sorsby is now going to the NFL suppl...

items.title: Family to have Smith's brain checked for CTE
items.body_text: The family of Aldon Smith has decided to send his brain to medical experts in Boston to see whether CTE played a role in the former NFL defensive lineman's death.

items.title: Sources: Sorsby set to enter supplemental draft
items.body_text: Amid legal wrangling over his NCAA eligibility, Texas Tech transfer quarterback Brendan Sorsby plans to apply for the NFL's supplemental draft.
items.author: Pete Thamel

items.title: Source: Pickens reports ahead of Cowboys' camp
items.body_text: As a precursor to this week's mandatory minicamp, Dallas Cowboys wide receiver George Pickens took his physical Monday at The Star, according to a source.
items.author: Todd Archer

items.title: Source: Pearce with Falcons, to attend minicamp
items.body_text: Falcons edge rusher James Pearce Jr. is back with the team and expected to take part in this week's minicamp, ESPN's Adam Schefter reported Monday.
items.author: Marc Raimondi

items.title: Megatron sees record falling, Nacua as top threat
items.body_text: Calvin Johnson doesn't expect his single-season NFL record for receiving yards to last much longer. And if he had to guess, Rams star Puka Nacua will be the one to break it.

items.title: Sources: Jets, durable Tippmann reach $62M deal
items.body_text: The Jets and right guard Joe Tippmann have agreed to a four-year, $62 million contract extension that includes $31 million in new guarantees, sources told ESPN on Monday.
items.author: Rich Cimini

items.title: Former defensive lineman Aldon Smith dies at 36
items.body_text: Aldon Smith, who played six seasons in the NFL with the 49ers, Raiders and Cowboys, has died at age 36.
items.author: Nick Wagoner

items.title: NFL closes personal conduct review of WR Diggs
items.body_text: The NFL has closed its review of wide receiver Stefon Diggs after determining there was insufficient evidence of a personal conduct policy violation, a league official told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

items.title: 😐 Reid coy on Kelce-Swift wedding attendance
items.body_text: According to Reid, despite being half of one of the most anticipated weddings in recent memory, Kelce is focused on training camp.
